## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? One paragraph. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix/`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat/`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`)
- [ ] CI / tooling (`ci/`)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Codex alignment

- [ ] No language-spec changes
- [ ] Codex chapter updated: <!-- e.g. docs/06-heresies.html -->
- [ ] N/A — tooling / CI only

## Testing

- [ ] `make proba` passes locally
- [ ] New/updated `*_proba.vg` test added
- [ ] New/updated exemplum in `exempla/`
- [ ] N/A — docs only

## Checklist

- [ ] Single concern per PR (no unrelated changes)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials committed
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional style (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`)
